content:
I need to analyze the dependency relations to find entities with no incoming edges (nothing points TO them).

Let me collect all targets from the relationship lines (both `-->` and `*--` and `<|--` and `<|..`).

From the diagrams, I'll identify all entities that appear as targets in dependency relations.

Looking at all the relation lines, I need to find entities that never appear on the RIGHT side of any `-->`, `*--`, `<|--`, or `<|..` relationship.

Let me go through the relationships systematically and collect all targets (right-hand side entities):

Targets collected from relations include: TestAnalysis, ArchJSON, ILanguagePlugin, TestPatternConfig, RawTestFile, TestFileInfo, TestMetrics, CoverageLink, TestIssue, Config, DiagramConfig, CLIOptions, ParseError, APIError, ValidationError, FileError, Error, ArchJsonDiskCache (as target), GitHistoryNotFoundError, LoadedHistoryData, GlobalConfig, ParseCache, PluginRegistry, FileDiscoveryService, ArchJSON, DiagramConfig, RenderHashCache, ArchJSONAggregator, MetricsCalculator, DiagramOutputRouter, ProgressReporterLike, ParallelProgressReporter, ArchJsonProvider, WorkerPoolFactory, QueryScopeCollector, DiagramPipelineRunner, InternalQueryScope, MermaidRenderWorkerPool, GlobalConfig, Entity, CycleInfo, PackageCoverage, DiagramResult, ArchJSONMetrics, ResolveOptions (as parent), PathResolution (as parent), ILanguagePlugin, PluginError, PluginInitializationError, PluginConfigError, ToolDependencyError, ParseError, FileSystemError, RawTestFile, ArchJSON, DetailLevel, Relation, Member, Parameter, TsMorphDecorator, Visibility, SourceLocation, RelationType, FileStats, MermaidParseValidator, ValidationError, CommentGenerator, ArchJSON, HeuristicGrouper, ValidatedMermaidGenerator, MermaidValidationPipeline, GroupingDecision, PackageGroup, LayoutDecision, MermaidRendererOptions, MermaidOutputPaths, Entity, Member, Relation, StructuralValidator, RenderValidator, QualityValidator, QualityValidationResult, QualityMetrics, QualitySuggestion, RenderValidationResult, RenderIssue, StructuralValidationResult, StructuralIssue, ParseValidationResult, ValidationPipelineResult, GoArchitectureAtlas, AtlasLayer, RenderFormat, RenderResult, PackageGraph, CapabilityGraph, GoroutineTopology, FlowGraph, etc.

After careful analysis of what appears only as SOURCE (left side) and never as TARGET (right side), the entities with no incoming dependencies would be the top-level entry points.

Looking at classes like: `TestAnalyzer`, `CacheManager`, `ConfigLoader`, `ErrorHandler`, `ProgressReporter`, `StderrReporter`, `NoopReporter`, `DiagramProcessor`, `TypeScriptPlugin`, `CppPlugin`, `GoPlugin`, `JavaPlugin`, `PythonPlugin`, `MermaidDiagramGenerator`, `ArchJSONAggregator`, `TypeScriptParser` - most of these ARE referenced as targets somewhere.

After careful analysis:
